channel.title: Debian on linuxrepos
channel.description: Recent content in Debian on linuxrepos

item.title: Auto Mount with SystemD
item.description: This shows how to automount remote network drives using systemd and fstab

item.title: Fix LibGL Errors
item.description: I recently had a debian install where Steam would not launch. Here is how I fixed it when it.

item.title: Star Trek Window Management
item.description: The LCARS system from Star Trek is a staple in the geek world. Ever since it made its first appearence in the Next Generation TV series in the 90s people have been obsessed with recreating that system. Leave it to Linux to give a functional LCARS recreation for those Star Trek fans out there.

item.title: Stop Using APT
item.description: APT is slow… single downloading and generally uses slow mirrors as it doesn’t optimize them out of the box. It also doesn’t have a history so rolling back updates can really suck.

item.title: Choosing the Right Linux Distro
item.description: Choosing a Linux distribution can be difficult, especially if you don’t know much about Linux. However, over the past several years I’ve tried almost every Distribution that you can choose. There are some that I have not installed, because it was just more of the same.

item.title: Setup Qemu in Debian Linux
item.description: This is guide on setting up QEMU in Debian Linux.
